voice: Our communication is direct and precise, focused on the technical specifications of screen-print production. We prioritize clear instructions on separations, ink handling, and print settings to ensure optimal results.

facts_from_brief.artwork_description: airbrushed cumulus CLOUD-GRADIENT illustration over a hard-edge slogan reading EXACTLY 'HEAD IN THE CLOUDS', printed on a BLACK tee
facts_from_brief.separation_components: a white underbase plate, three masked Ben-Day halftone spot plates (lavender 2635C, cobalt 2945C, deep purple 2685C) with a dot-gain choke so shadows don't plug on a black tee, a vectorized hard-edge lettering plate held out of the halftone
facts_from_brief.alt_colorway_requirement: distressed VHS alt colourway (licensed grunge + grain + noise + glitch) for the merch mockup
facts_from_brief.technical_documentation: Illustrator-rendered separation sheet with registration marks plus per-ink swatch cards data-merged from the shop's spot-colour CSV

invented: Tagline: Precision separations for vibrant apparel.
